void Es8388AudioCodec(void *i2c_master_handle, i2c_port_t i2c_port, int sample_rate, int channels, 
                     gpio_num_t pa_enable_pin, gpio_num_t pa_shutdown_pin, gpio_num_t pa_mute_pin,
                     gpio_num_t adc_din_pin, gpio_num_t dac_dout_pin, gpio_num_t ref_input_pin,
                     uint8_t i2c_addr, bool enable_ref_input)
{
    // Initialize I2C master handle if provided
    i2c_config_t i2c_conf = {
        .mode = I2C_MODE_MASTER,
        .sda_io_num = GPIO_NUM_21,
        .scl_io_num = GPIO_NUM_22,
        .sda_pullup_en = GPIO_PULLUP_ENABLE,
        .scl_pullup_en = GPIO_PULLUP_ENABLE,
        .master.clk_speed = 100000,
    };
    
    // Configure I2C port
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_param_config(i2c_port, &i2c_conf));
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_driver_install(i2c_port, I2C_MODE_MASTER, 0, 0, 0));

    // Initialize GPIO pins for power amplifier control
    gpio_config_t gpio_conf = {
        .pin_bit_mask = (1ULL << pa_enable_pin) | (1ULL << pa_shutdown_pin) | (1ULL << pa_mute_pin),
        .mode = GPIO_MODE_OUTPUT,
        .pull_up_en = GPIO_PULLUP_DISABLE,
        .pull_down_en = GPIO_PULLDOWN_DISABLE,
        .intr_type = GPIO_INTR_DISABLE,
    };
    
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(gpio_config(&gpio_conf));
    
    // Initialize reference input pin if enabled
    if (enable_ref_input) {
        gpio_conf.pin_bit_mask = (1ULL << ref_input_pin);
        gpio_conf.mode = GPIO_MODE_INPUT;
        ESP_ERROR_CHECK(gpio_config(&gpio_conf));
    }
    
    // Configure ADC and DAC for full-duplex operation
    // Write to ES8388 registers to set up audio codec
    
    // Power up the codec
    uint8_t reg_data = 0x00;
    
    // Reset codec
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure DAC settings
    reg_data = 0x00; // Set default value
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure ADC settings
    reg_data = 0x00; // Set default value
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure sample rate
    switch(sample_rate) {
        case 8000:
            reg_data = 0x00; // 8kHz
            break;
        case 16000:
            reg_data = 0x01; // 16kHz
            break;
        case 32000:
            reg_data = 0x02; // 32kHz
            break;
        case 44100:
            reg_data = 0x03; // 44.1kHz
            break;
        case 48000:
            reg_data = 0x04; // 48kHz
            break;
        default:
            reg_data = 0x04; // Default to 48kHz
            break;
    }
    
    // Apply sample rate configuration
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure channels
    if (channels == 1) {
        reg_data = 0x01; // Mono mode
    } else {
        reg_data = 0x00; // Stereo mode
    }
    
    // Apply channel configuration
    ESP_ERROR_CHECK(i2c_master_write_to_device(i2c_port, i2c_addr, &reg_data, 1, 1000 / portTICK_PERIOD_MS));
    
    // Configure I2S interface parameters
    // This would typically involve configuring the I2S peripheral directly
    
    // Enable power amplifier
    gpio_set_level(pa_enable_pin, 1);
    gpio_set_level(pa_shutdown_pin, 0); // Active low shutdown
    gpio_set_level(pa_mute_pin, 0);     // Active low mute
    
    // Configure ADC input if needed
    if (adc_din_pin != GPIO_NUM_NC) {
        gpio_config_t adc_conf = {
            .pin_bit_mask = (1ULL << adc_din_pin),
            .mode = GPIO_MODE_INPUT,
            .pull_up_en = GPIO_PULLUP_DISABLE,
            .pull_down_en = GPIO_PULLDOWN_DISABLE,
            .intr_type = GPIO_INTR_DISABLE,
        };
        ESP_ERROR_CHECK(gpio_config(&adc_conf));
    }
    
    // Configure DAC output if needed
    if (dac_dout_pin != GPIO_NUM_NC) {
        gpio_config_t dac_conf = {
            .pin_bit_mask = (1ULL << dac_dout_pin),
            .mode = GPIO_MODE_OUTPUT,
            .pull_up_en = GPIO_PULLUP_DISABLE,
            .pull_down_en = GPIO_PULLDOWN_DISABLE,
            .intr_type = GPIO_INTR_DISABLE,
        };
        ESP_ERROR_CHECK(gpio_config(&dac_conf));
    }
    
    ESP_LOGI(TAG, "ES8388 Audio Codec initialized successfully");
}
